## Add your pet

Thanks for contributing to Woofbook!

### Checklist

- [ ] I added **one** pet entry in `pets/entries/<id>.json`
- [ ] I added a matching photo at `pets/images/<id>.jpg` (or `.jpeg` / `.png` / `.webp`)
- [ ] My `id` is unique and uses lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
- [ ] My `image` path matches my `id` (for example `pets/images/jane-max.jpg`)

CI builds `pets/manifest.json` automatically when your PR is merged — you do not need to add it.
